Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zenith Device]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — Zenith Devices are the original Aethertech and are mythical treasures from an era beyond reliable history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — A Zenith Device is a powerful entity or object that even the staff Eurias might struggle against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — A Zenith Device can use conjuration spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — A Zenith Device is a type of technology or object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The simulation is powered by a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — The Zenith Device is a prize in a contest.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — The existence of a Zenith Device has not been proven in any of the narrator's other lives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 25''' — Zenith Devices are entities or machines that can be active in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Zenith Devices can possess heavy pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — The Zenith Blade is a potential Zenith Device that is halfway across the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Zenith Device folds dimensions and violates space by bending the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — A Zenith Device is a technology that may not be limited to the laws of biology.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — A Zenith Device possesses magical resistance that can fracture a seal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Zenith Device is a high-level technology/artifact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Starhammer had access to a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — The Zenith Device is a chunk of obsidian in the shape of a cut diamond.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Mell wants her Zenith Device back.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Zenith Devices do not actively seek out partners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — Zenith Devices are self-aware once their awakening conditions are satisfied.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — A Zenith Device cannot lower its standards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — Benri Vallenar aims to potentially awaken another Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 25''' — A Zenith Device can choose Champions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 29''' — A Zenith Device provides resources to a Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Zenith Device is an entity that can chuckle and evaluate qualifications.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — A Zenith Device is a powerful creation of ancient humanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — A Zenith Device is a piece of technology that can take an interest in someone personally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — A Zenith Device can appear as an AI projection of yellow lights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — A Zenith Device is a voice that called Doctor Oladyne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — A Zenith Device is a piece of technology that can be modified.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — The Zenith Device is an object that can stand against the eyes of Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Zenith Devices have basic functions and their exact powers depend on their users and tasks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Aila is a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Aila uses a Zenith Device to keep up with enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The voice from the Zenith Colony identified as a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — A Zenith Device can be brought up to full power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — An active Zenith Device may be aboard the Karoshan facility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Universal Manufacturing cargo ship is carrying a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — A Zenith Device was involved in a battle at Advocate headquarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — A Zenith Device is an item that might cause skills to rust.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — The Last Horizon contained a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Zenith Blade is a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Mell possesses a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Aila Escalon carries a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — A Zenith Device fills the laboratory with musical laughter.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
